name: Stargate BSC
special_mechanism_summary: Stargate BSC uses the same Delta algorithm unified cross-chain liquidity system as the Ethereum deployment, holding USDT/USDC/BUSD pools for cross-chain transfers. BSC credits in the Delta algorithm affect Ethereum and vice versa, and veSTG gauge weight voting on Ethereum also affects BSC pool fee splits.
notes: C3' combination potential: same cross-chain credit asymmetry as Ethereum Stargate — a large BSC deposit inflates credits enabling large Ethereum withdrawals; BSC's higher transaction volume and lower gas costs make cross-chain credit attacks via Stargate cheaper to execute from BSC side; veSTG accumulated on Ethereum controls BSC pool reward splits, creating cross-chain governance manipulation surface.
